checks.name: State Independence
checks.notes: Skill is fully stateless. Context preserved through physical artifacts (THREAT_MODEL.md, VULNERABILITY_REPORT.md, SECURITY_PATCH.md, VALIDATION_REPORT.md, SECURITY_SUMMARY.md).

checks.name: Artifact Gating
checks.notes: Every transition requires the preceding artifact. Mandatory Wait-For-Human between PATCH and VALIDATE.

checks.name: Intent Preservation
checks.notes: Mandatory 'context' in THREAT_MODEL.md and VULNERABILITY_REPORT.md. 'tradeoffs_rejected' in SECURITY_PATCH.md.

checks.name: Loop Breakers
checks.notes: max_retries: 3 in YAML frontmatter. Wait-For-Human is mandatory for ALL security patches.

checks.name: Physical Execution Standards
checks.notes: VALIDATE uses Exit Code 0 from test suites. CRITIC verifies no new attack surfaces.

checks.name: Single-File Format
checks.notes: YAML frontmatter combined with Markdown body in SKILL.md.

checks.name: Composite Personas
checks.notes: Clearly defined: Threat Analyst (Scout), Auditor (Scan), Surgeon (Patch), Verifier (Validate), Senior Security Architect (Critic).

checks.name: Graceful Degradation
checks.notes: Explicit tool requirements. Security patches NEVER auto-applied. HITL is central to safety.

checks.name: Separation of Concerns
checks.notes: YAML handles routing logic; Markdown handles cognitive instructions.

checks.name: Agent Agnosticism
checks.notes: No reliance on specific LLM features. Tool-based scanning and exit-code-based validation.
